prediction.reasoning: Based on typical stock volatility patterns for large-cap healthcare/medical device companies like Boston Scientific, I estimated an 18-day forecast using assumed daily volatility of ~1.5%. The point estimate reflects slight upward bias typical of equity markets over short-medium horizons. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution with widening ranges to capture increasing uncertainty over the 18-day period.
